center.name: 阿马库罗三角洲州
center.summary: 阿马库罗三角洲州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、Black-spotted barbet、Crimson-hooded manakin等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-spotted barbet is found in the eastern parts of Venezuela's Bolívar and Delta Amacuro states, the three countries of the Guianas, and the Brazilian states of Roraima, Pará, and Amapá north of the Amazon River

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in eastern Venezuela's Amazonas, Bolívar, and southern Delta Amacuro states east to the Atlantic through the Guianas and northern Brazil north of the Amazon.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Venezuela from Sucre south to far eastern Amazonas though only thinly south of Delta Amacuro.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: griseigularis is found in the eastern part of the eastern Venezuelan states of Delta Amacuro and Bolívar and slightly east into western Guyana and also in Brazil along the lower Amazon River from the lower Tapajós River to its mouth

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: klagesi has a limited range in central and eastern Venezuela from Delta Amacuro south through Bolívar into northern Amazonas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Guianan woodcreeper is found in northern Amazonia in the eastern Venezuelan states of Delta Amacuro and Bolívar, the Guianas, and northern Brazil north of the Amazon River from the Rio Negro east to the Atlantic ocean

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The painted tody-flycatcher is found in Amazonas, eastern Bolívar, and Delta Amacuro states in eastern Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: One population is found in the northeastern Venezuelan states of Monagas and Delta Amacuro

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: brunnescens is found in the Serranía del Perijá where northeastern Colombia and northwestern Venezuela meet, east around Lake Maracaibo, and also in the Venezuelan Coastal Ranges intermittenly from Falcón to Delta Amacuro.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C
